entry.title: Re: Customer Hierarchies in Sales material listing and exclusion
entry.content: Informative

entry.title: Re: Proof Of Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for inviting me to address your question.

In short:
1. 10 units will be deducted from your company’s stock, as documented by the relevant material records.
2. Sales billing will reflect only 8 units.

Best regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Run the Report with tile(for standard variant) is giving issue but in webide is working fine

entry.title: Re: Creating mass user using eCATT (script)
entry.content:
Hello,
I downloaded the variant file. However it got downloaded in transposed format. That is rows and column. Attached screenshot.
How can this be fixed ?

idPNAMEPTYPPINDEXVALUEVAL_TYPEDEEP_DATA
ECATTDEFAULTPASSWORD2I4Welcome@1234567  
ECATTDEFAULTPASSWORD1I3Welcome@1234567  
ECATTDEFAULTLASTNAMEI2SINGH  
ECATTDEFAULTFIRSTNAMEI1GAJINDER  
ECATTDEFAULTUSERIDI5GAJI_TEST

entry.title: Re: APM - Indicator monitoring not showing all values
entry.content: hi, We have encountered this behavior, this could be a bug, I recommend to create an ticket. On the other hand the values shown on 'Indicator monitoring' are aggregated values depending on the duration chosen. refer documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_APM/1bb12075258a41e1a024d28a6ddfe246/a2416a1b8a3a4343a4005579e6fbb66a.html.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports License
entry.content: It depends. If it's a desktop application running on Windows (not Terminal Server though), you're covered by the free runtime. If it's a server application or they're using it on Terminal Server, they'll need a licence for Crystal Reports.

entry.title: Copy Inspection results from One inspection lot origin (04) to another lot origin(10)
entry.content:
Hello All,

The Client is performing result recording only once after GR of process order (inspection type -04) and we need to copy the same results when Inspection type - 10 is triggered.

Your prompt response is really appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports License
entry.content: Sorry, should have added, if you're selling a lot of this, you could get OEM licences but not sure how that's done any more (my time in Crystal OEM was 20+ years ago and I can no longer sell OEM through distribution)

entry.title: Re: connect PostgreSQL, hyperscaler DB in power BI desktop
entry.content:
Not able to connect DB instance directly so written one secured API using that retrieving data.
For dynamic token generation refer: 
https://advaiya.com/generate-dynamic-token-and-get-data-from-custom-api-in-power-bi/

entry.title: Re: AUTO height details section
entry.content:
Don't use page footers for anything more than page number or comments.

Group the report by quote number or equivalent with page throw after group footer or before group header (except on first page). Move your page footer stuff to the group footer.

Never have multiple lines in a single detail section. Split into multiple detail sections, then hide the blank bits.

entry.title: Re: KPI display error
entry.content:
Hi  mario_galeano

Please note that Adobe announced the end of support for Adobe Flash Player: https://theblog.adobe.com/adobe-flash-update/ and Microsoft announced the removal of the Adobe Flash Player in Microsoft Windows Operating Systems, see KB4577586.

Please check below blogs for more details:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/end-of-life-for-adobe-flash-based-dashboards-embedded-in-sap-business-one/ba-p/13465578

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Job Evaluation in SuccessFactors compensation management
entry.content: Thanks Xavier for confirming...!!

entry.title: Single stage and multistage application
entry.content:
Single Stage and Multistage Job Applications

Overview: -

  • This feature enables the option to expose different application fields, at different points in the application process.
  • The purpose of configuring the multistage application is to allow users to control which fields to display to candidate or recruiting operators based on candidate status

Single stage application: -

  • Candidate completes the Application data at the initial stage only, which means the posted job while applying to the candidate that time only the Applicant can edit and fill in the details within the application process.
  • After applying for the Job the applicant is unable to edit/change the fields but able to see the fields.
  • But Recruiting users can able to see all the fields in all the statuses. 

 How to configure Single stage application: -

Enable Recruiting in Provisioning

  • Configure the fields that are required by the customer and provide the permissions for Roles.
  • See the below screenshot here the field permissions are provided as per Roles.

Example: - the particular Recruiting user needs permissions for Edit access to the particular fields then you can provide the Write access to that role user in entire statuses.

 

Here another Example

  •             All the Users have read permissions for particular fields in all the stages in Applicant status.
  •             These below fields are visible for all the users in all stages, but they don’t have any Write

permissions for fields

Multistage Applications: -

  • The purpose of configuring the multistage application is to allow users to control which fields to display to candidate or recruiting operators based on candidate status.

Configuration in XML template

  • In the Application Template we can give only a few permissions to users as found below screenshot.
  • we have to provide/Control the field permissions through the Job Requisition Template (JRDM) for All multi-users and multiple fields.

Application Template field permissions for Users: -

  • Here in application Template only few permissions provide to the Users
  • All other permissions give to the access to users in JRDM Template.

Permissions for users in JRDM template: -

  • Here the application fields are configured in the Candidate details Template But the permissions will be provided in the JRDM like the below screenshot.
  • In the screenshots There is an Applicant status Set Name Written.
  • And the permissions are provided as per Users.

 

  • Here the candidate Having these are the statuses have Write permissions for particular fields

  • As per above screenshot the Recruiting Users does have a Read permission for this particular fields in particular statuses.

Example: -

  • R Role users want to see some particular fields only in some stages that time we can restrict the permissions as per Requirement.
  • On these Statuses only, R can able to see and edit the fields no other statuses the user will not be able to do these things.

  • Here as per the Below screenshot in the HR INTERVIEW status the Recruiters need some details from the Candidate, At that time the candidate Received a mail Notification that was Already Configured in the applicant status set.
  • After the candidate logs in through the link he will Update the details as per Permissions which provided to Candidate and Recruiting users as well.
  • The candidate does have Write permissions for the Interview stage. The candidate fills in the needed details and updates the application. these details will be see the Recruiting users in the Audit trail.

 

Conclusion: -

  • Here the Beauty of Recruitment process is Restrict the application permissions as per the Roles and to the candidate as well.
  • So, the Fields will be secure and the candidate details only will be visible to Authorized Users in the organization.
  • The Candidate data will not be able to be seen by every user which are users which is why the data needs to be visible or editable.

entry.title: Re: Proof Of Delivery
entry.content:
Dear Fancy_zou,

Thank you for your prompt response.

My concern is, how will we deal with the remaining 2 units? The inventory has been reduced by 10 units, but we are billing for only 8 units. How will we handle these remaining 2 units? According to the Proof of Delivery (POD), we will not be able to charge the customer for them. Therefore, we need to adjust these units somewhere.

Please correct me if I am wrong.

Thank you.

entry.title: Can interview scheduling still be for Microsoft on prem and not Microsoft 365?
entry.content: Client uses Microsoft on prem and not Microsoft 365. Can interview scheduling still be used? How can it be maintained when manage interview scheduling is deprecated?

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation Difference must be zero before reconciling (message 3821-8)
Decouple TR
entry.content:
Hi SAP,


We will get a request to withdraw the charm and attached steps which we are following.

We are having few queries

a. We have withdraw the charm PHONE_NUMBER) and need to decouple the TR(ECDK918459) Please let us know the process to decouple TR's.
b. Could you please let us know steps which we have attached process is correct or not.

Thanks & Regards,

Naresh.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Decouple TR
entry.content:
Hi Naresh,

There are some prerequisites when decoupling the TR from ChaRM document, see below document for more details:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/2b6042c23fa044b6977fbf76258b0628.html

There is no standard report to decouple TR before you withdraw a ChaRM document, as it requires prerequisites.

BR,

Shawn

entry.title: FSM Android: Templates for offline HTML reports not selectable
entry.content:
Good morning experts,

I have created a HTML report template for the checkout process. Using on Windows is working fine without any issues.

But the Android app does not offer me the offline reports for selection, only the online report templates are listed:

In the company settings, I have found the setting CoreSystems.Reports.PreviewAsHTML which is related to the reports on Android. But activating this setting does not solve the situation.

Can anybody help me?

Thanks and best regards,

Christoph

entry.title: Multiple email to ship to party
entry.content:
Hi 

Could you please let me know if it is possible to maintain multiple email email address to ship to party while creating sales order using bapi.

Currently I am using BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 and I can pass single email in parameter "partneraddresses" and this is getting updated while I need to maintain multiple emails. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Create new report tile (App) - On Premise
entry.content:
Greetings @Arleigh,

I am trying to prepare two variants of a report (Manage ** app) and I am having some issues. I prepare the reports and I successfully save them as tiles and the tile quick info shows the correct result (6) of the tile (count of returned rows) but when I click on the custom tile the report is defaulted to the general variant.

So my question is: What must I do that when I click on the custom tile SAP will show the relevant data (the 6 rows as represented in the quick result of the tile)?

Thank you for you help.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: I have tried... still error. The only way to make POST succeed is through $Batch. I still don't know why and if it is applicable when ultimately used by other app. I have posted the screnshot in another answer. May be you know why the post only works when I use $Batch ?

entry.title: Turn off toggle for learners
entry.content:
Read from Enabling your workforce for the future with the ne... - SAP Community on the following below -

2H 2024: The option to opt out of the new learning experience will no longer be available. Customers can set the legacy experience as the default experience for learners, by setting the user toggle default to off, which means that learners start with the legacy experience but can choose to use the new experience by turning the toggle to on.

If the organization isn't ready to launch the new learning experience, can we disable the toggle button for learners after the 2H 2024 release as the depreciation of the legacy learning home page should take place only in early 2025.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: Is there any way to modify UI annotations vi...
entry.content:
I think you should change your approach but the outcome you want is achievable. 

Take a look at this documentation: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/f49a0f7eaafe444daf4cd62d48120ad0.html

You will be particularly interested in the @ui.Hidden and  @Common.FieldControl annotations.  

This fiori elements annotation shows how you could dynamically control the visibility of a field: 

entity ProductsType : {
    UI.FieldGroup #AdministrativeData : {
    Data : [
        {
            $Type : 'UI.DataField',
            Label : 'Modified at',
            Value : ModifiedAt,
            ![@UI.Hidden] : HasDraftEntity,
        },
    ],
},
}

You could easily replace 'HasDraftEntity' with a virtual field you calculate

Also checkout the SFLIGHT scenario as that makes fields readonly based off the status:

https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-sflight/blob/main/app/travel_processor/field-control.cds

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements and SAP CAP: How to make a field e...
entry.content: Checkout the SFLIGHT scenario: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-sflight/blob/main/app/travel_processor/field-control.cds

entry.title: Re: How to Create an Effective SAP Support Case: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
Hello Team,

1048170/2024 Fiori Tile used to delete supplier at single Purchase Org level

We are waiting for your support on this. Once again, I am giving clear explanation on this issue.

Business requirement: Business wanted to make deletion flag for specific supplier at specific purchase organization level.
we have checked on the fiori tiles: Manage supplier master data and Manage Business partner master data. In both tiles we have option of Purchasing block at specific organization level and deletion at central level is available. But business need is Deletion to be made at specific purchase org level instead of central level.

can you please check and provide any other tile we have for deletion of supplier at specific purchase org level or else above-mentioned tiles can we have solution.

Thank you!

entry.title: Customer wants to know how to add custom user status to ChaRM
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

 

We wanted to enable GSI & DAB features for every charm ID that we create.

Attach the screen print for reference on the ask.

Can you provide insights on what configuration changes need to be performed to accomplish.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Customer wants to know how to add custom user status...
entry.content:
Hi customer,

Regarding your requirement, it seems you want to add new custom user statuses to your ChaRM document, if this is the case, kindly refer to KBA:##2500852 - ChaRM Customizing: Inserting New User Status for more details.

BR,

Shawn

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements and SAP CAP: How to make a field e...
entry.content:
Checkout the SFLIGHT scenario as that makes fields read only based off travel status:

https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-sflight/blob/main/app/travel_processor/field-control.cds

annotate TravelService.Booking {
  BookingDate   @Core.Computed;
  ConnectionID  @Common.FieldControl  : to_Travel.TravelStatus.fieldControl;
  FlightDate    @Common.FieldControl  : to_Travel.TravelStatus.fieldControl;
  FlightPrice   @Common.FieldControl  : to_Travel.TravelStatus.fieldControl;
  BookingStatus @Common.FieldControl  : to_Travel.TravelStatus.fieldControl;
  to_Carrier    @Common.FieldControl  : to_Travel.TravelStatus.fieldControl;
  to_Customer   @Common.FieldControl  : to_Travel.TravelStatus.fieldControl;
};

sap.fe.cap.travel-TravelStatus.csv

code;name;fieldControl;createDeleteHidden;insertDeleteRestriction
O;Open;7;false;true
A;Accepted;1;true;false
X;Canceled;7;true;false

entry.title: Cannot see some transaction type in ChaRM request for change scope
entry.content:
We are not able to find the ChaRM Urgent Change in RFC. Screenshot attached.

Can you please help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cannot see some transaction type in ChaRM request for...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Regarding your issue, could you please follow KBA: ##2598158 - What controls the transaction type offered in RfC Scope assignment block? - Solution Manager to verify if the related urgent change transaction type is configured in column 'Target Transaction Type' or not? If not, you need to add a new entry for it if you want to see urgent change under scope item.

BR,

Shawn

entry.title: Re: Not getting data and 401 Unauthorize error in Mobile...
entry.content:
Hi @panushjain,

When I try to same in local dev space I am getting this and are using IAS for authentication purpose:

entry.title: Re: How to create deep insert in CAPM (Node.js).Give a Example using Composition.
entry.content:
Given this schema:

entity Books {
  key ID           : UUID;
      title        : String;
      description  : String;
      stock        : Integer;
      reorderPoint : Integer;
      statusCode   : String;
      price        : Integer;
      to_Chapters  : Composition of many Chapters
                       on to_Chapters.to_Books = $self
}

entity Chapters {
  key ID       : UUID;
      title    : String;
      to_Books : Association to Books
}

Some code like:

const  payload = {
  title: "201",
  stock: 1,
  description: "capval 3",
  price: 3,
  statusCode: "A",
  reorderPoint: 6,
  to_Chapters: [
    {
      title: "Introduction",
    },
  ],
};

await cds.tx(req).run(INSERT.into(Books).entries(payload))

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano ,

I hope this message finds you well. My name is M Yaseen Afza, and I am an SAP MM Consultant from Pakistan with two years of consulting experience in SAP MM. Recently, I have completed the "Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement" course, and I am eager to further enhance my skills through certification.

I am passionate about SAP because it plays a crucial role in helping businesses streamline and improve their processes. The impact of technology in driving business success is inspiring, and I’m committed to continuously learning and advancing in this field for a long-term career.

I am reaching out to request a free certification attempt, as I believe it will significantly contribute to my professional development and help me stay updated with the latest advancements in SAP. I am deeply grateful for this opportunity and look forward to the possibilities it will bring.

Thank you for considering my application.

Thanks & Regards,
M Yaseen Afzal

entry.title: Re: Not getting data and 401 Unauthorize error in Mobile...
entry.content:
When you tested the mobile services destination using the "Launch in Browser" option, did you enter the relative path (/sap/opu/....) in the browser? If so, did you see the service document and the respective data for a given entity set? Is that correct? Also, it didn’t prompt for any credentials, right?

Did you use the same relative path in your .service file?

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have completed this activity, but the Badge not assigned yet.

entry.title: Re: SAC Memberset - Version Property
entry.content:
Hi @SAC_Newbie 

Unfortunately, "MEMBERSET [d/Date].[p/YEAR] = [d/Version].[p/Year]" is not supported on the Advanced Formulas script.  

You can get your expected DATE scope which is "202401" to "202412" on the below script;

  • MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/Year] TO NEXT(11,"MONTH", [d/Version].[p/Year])

The Version property "[p/Year]" has a value of "2024" and it is recognized as 202401 in a model with month granularity. 

In addition, the data type of [d/Version].[p/Year] should be TEXT type, Numeric data type is not recognized as date type(202401) value.  

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please let me know.

Moonjun

entry.title: 手动创建计划订单，当某个组件在MRP4设置了后继料时，计划订单的组件清单中没有带出来后继物料。只有手动创建的计划订单会这样，MRP跑出来的计划订单是会带出后继物料。
entry.content:
手动创建计划订单，当某个组件在MRP4设置了后继料时，计划订单的组件清单中没有带出来后继物料。只有手动创建的计划订单会这样，MRP跑出来的计划订单是会带出后继物料。

为什么手动创建的计划订单会带不出来后继料？

 

MM03：

 

MD11：

MRP跑出来的计划订单组件清单：

entry.title: Re: Manufacture Part Number visibility in VSS Screens
entry.content:
Hello @KasunG 

First of all, apologies for the delayed response. 

I went through your question and would like to know more about your situation. My first assumption is that you have activated the MPN. Is that correct?. Meanwhile, I would also request you to create an incident so that our support team can check it in your system directly.

I shall update the SAP community forum once we conduct the diagnosis.

Best Regards,

Shafi from proaxia

entry.title: SAP Fiori launchpad - save as tile functionality
entry.content:
Greetings,

I am trying to prepare two variants of a report (Manage ** app) and I am having some issues.

I prepare the reports, and I successfully save them as tiles and the tile quick info shows the correct result (6 and 122  - count of returned rows) but when I click on the custom tile the report is defaulted to the general variant.

So my question is: What must I do that when I click on the custom tile SAP will show the relevant data (the 6 or 122 rows as represented in the quick result of the tile)?

Thank you for you help.

Best regards, Matjaž.

if We did not give relative path in Mobile Service it will give error in browser when click on Launch in browser:

entry.title: Re: CLEARING DOCUMENT COLUMN CONTENT
entry.content:
Check in FS00, is this account managed in open items?

  • Flag: 'Indicator: Open Item Management?'
  • In this case the item is not to be cleared and wont carry the clearing document reference

entry.content:

This is for importing data to SAC Planning.

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content: as Datasphere is not compatible With Calculation Views,

entry.title: how to transform xml from one format to other
entry.content:
input format :

<Values>
<Value AttributeID="edi" ID="13" Changed="true">WERA</Value>
<Value AttributeID="multiVendor" ID="14" Changed="true">1234</Value>
<Value AttributeID="vendorSubType" ID="15" Changed="true">Warehouse</Value>

</Values>

Required Format:

<Values>
<edi>
<Changed>true</Changed>
<ID>13</ID>
<text>WERA</text>
</edi>

<multiVendor>
<Changed>true</Changed>
<ID>14</ID>
<text>1234</text>
</multiVendor>

<vendorSubType>
<Changed>true</Changed>
<ID>15</ID>
<text>Warehouse</text>
</vendorSubType>


</Values>

please help me in converting xml its  urgent.

entry.title: NPS WRONG DEDUCTION
entry.content:

Please provide the solution.

 

Patch installed

SAP_HR

608

118

SAPKE608B8

136

SAPKE608D6

Human Resources

entry.title: Re: Field-symbol gets unassigned unexpectedly.
entry.content: Actually, the the assignment was successful. The program were able to go inside the IF ENDIF logic. I'm curious why after that IF ENDIF, the <FS_TEST> went unassigned. But thanks.

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content: @JulianJuraske Hello, as Datasphere is not compatible With Calculation Views, we need to migrate around 400 calculation views, so we need DSP + HDI container. today the customer has rows security implemented in hana modeling on prem through analytic privileges. so the mapping is done between Front end user and database user. Now since datasphere has a managed hana cloud database (we do not have admin rights), the only way to create database users is through spaces (we left apart database analysis user and groups as they have a cap of 10% of the workload). So there are 2 way: one as above, the second is asking improvements to SAP influence.

entry.title: Re: SAP HRM structure and configuration
entry.content: Thanks this is very helpful. But I want to know if I am adding a new employee and that employee data does not exist in the system then how can I enter the position and personnel number, employee group and sub-group? can you explain?

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
Now I'm even more concerned 😉 
In your Case the Calculation View is the Endresult that you want to provide to the Frontend Tool ( I assume FIORI/UI5 from your desription )? 

The DB User are for OUTBOUND, so from DSP -> SAC (or other BI Tool) or are you using them for this scenario:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/1aec7ca95af24208a61c1a444b249d95.html
But in that Case I don't get why on earth you would need 350 Users ;), shouldn't one be enough? 
And than you implement the DAC in DSP?

entry.title: Re: Which B1 localization we should select when setting u...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can check the contact list and localizations list information at the following link:

SAP Partner Portal | SAP Business One Country Localizations & Contacts

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Product ID mass update needed inside RFCs and Change Documents
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have implemented ChaRM for managed system P01 (5-tier landscape) in which we are going to perform RISE migration.

We knew that new Ibase ID will be created for P01 system once the migration is completed and it will cause "Product ID xxxxxxxx is Locked" and "Product ID xxxxxxx is Archived" errors in ChaRM.

We need your support/ guidance to perform mass update of the product ID information of open RFCs and Change documents related to this landscape under ChaRM as we have huge number of open items in both Maintenance track and project track (around DIGITS RFCs/CDs)

Recently we faced similar issue with P23 landscape and SAP suggested note DIGITS (Case: DIGITS/DIGITS) for Change documents and we manually updated the RFCs (very less in number).

Now, we are having huge RFC/ CDs and manual update is not possible.

Kindly provide us your suggestion with the best option to perform mass update of ibase component information of P01 system inside ChaRM for both RFCs and Change documents.

Thanks

Faizal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Product ID mass update needed inside RFCs and Change...
entry.content:
Hi Faizal,

Regarding your concern, kindly follow suggestions from KBA:##3025535. Generally, you need to run report AI_MODIFY_IBASE_IN_DOC to update the old ibases. 

For mass update, only those documents with the same transaction type and the same old ibase and the same new ibase, could be updated in mass. Otherwise you need to update one by one. 

BR,

Shawn

entry.title: Re: How can an independent consultant purchase a new 'red...
entry.content:
Hi Margit,

i created yesterday a new order using the link and instructions you provided. This morning i got familiar email from SAP Store Admin requesting validations documents:
In order to complete your order, we need to validate your company information.
 
Therefore, please provide us with any of the supporting documents listed below so that we can validate your account and process your order
The Acceptable supporting documents are:
 
Link to local government authority websites or registry confirming requested details.
Legally valid documentation (such as Corporate Incorporation Certificate)
Tax certificates/government certificate.

I did not answer yet.

Last time i provided my VAT tax certificate along with some background info. Then my order was cancelled by SAP Store Admin. I wrote then two times to ‚ Customer Service SAP Training and Adoption’ (TRAINING.GERMANY@SAP.COM), but they are appearantly not responsible as their mailbox is not monitored (This mailbox is no longer in use and any inquiries submitted here will not be processed).

I then created a ticket in the new learning support portal, but they routed only to the SAP Store Admin who then cancelled my order for the second time (after asking me for validation information for which i provided again my VAT tax certficate, but to no avail).

The communication with SAP Store Admin is a bit difficult as they never actually said why they would not accept my vat tax certificate. They only did send standard emails.

One issue i noticed after reading your response yesterday. When placing my first order on September 1st, i entered for ‚company’ my last name and ‚Beratung’ (to indicate i am not a private person, but use SAP Learning Hub for business purposes). When placing the order yesterday,  this was defaulted, i could not change this. Not sure if this term ‚Beratung’ confuses the topic for the SAP Store.
I also wrote last week to 'support.emea@sap.com' who could not help but suggested to look for help here in the community forum (which i then did)

How do you suggest to proceed with this?
Best Regards
Marcus

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi everyone, hope everyone's doing fantastic. New here and looking for your support!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP Asset Manager - Requested object &ESRT_IDP_ID& is currently locked by user
entry.content:
Hello Preeti,

Did you resolve the issue? I am experiencing the same issue. Appreciate your help

entry.title: Re: Field-symbol gets unassigned unexpectedly.
entry.content: You must have done something in the IF...ENDIF block to unassign the field symbol. If you had shared IF...ENDIF block source code, we would be able to help more.

entry.title: Re: Converting Date format from Systemdate to Epoch/UNIX timestamp(1513774271000) in SAP PI?
entry.content: Hi, I have a same requirement for one of the interface , could you please share the UDF

entry.title: Re: Is there help available with resume or CV building ?
entry.content: Of course, resume or CV building assistance is also something that is taken seriously and one can definitely get help in this regard! These are rather cheap, affordable for most people and many providers offer assistance in this. But if you need help, you may consider contacting Write My Essay UK, where there are professionals who are willing to provide you with the best writing services and resume your work history in the most satisfactory way for prospective employers.

entry.title: post file at api using form-data
entry.content:
We have a requirement where we have to pull file from SFTP and send to API with header with Form-data option.

Post man header and body screen as below :

 

 

with reference with blog "How to send multipart/form-data from SAP Cloud Int... - SAP Community" we tried but we are getting 400 error saying below

 

{"message":"Failed to read the request form. Unexpected end of Stream, the content may have already been read by another component. \n"}

 

Can any one please help the same.

 

-Lakshman

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Can I still deploy a SAP Build Apps project from the launch window?
entry.content:
Since the last Build Apps UI update I can't deploy a project from the Build Tab anymore. Previously I pressed "Build" then chose if it should be a ZIP or a MTA, that was nice. Now I just chose Workzone and it Builds my project and I can download it but cant deploy it from Build Apps deploy Tab anymore or can I? How do I now do the deployment anyway, do I manyally have to upload it to the Workzone?

Thanks for your help 🙂

entry.title: SAP Business One API DeliveryNotes
entry.content:
Hi all

A customer of ours is using SAP Business One. Their SAP partner refuses to help or provide documentation.
I have implemented the REST API for retrieving suppliers/customers/... Only thing which is left to do is posting a DeliveryNote. 

I found the POST DeliveryNote endpoint here:
https://help.sap.com/doc/056f69366b5345a386bb8149f1700c19/10.0/en-US/Service%20Layer%20API%20Reference.html

Only thing is: I don't know SAP that well. It's unclear for me which fields I have to send in the JSON. Can anyone provide more documentation? An example call maybe?
If I would know which fields are required and which are optional i will figure it out.

Big thanks for any response!

entry.title: Re: Issue with actual data when we have data not published
entry.content:
Is the Actual column and Forecast column referring to actual version and forecast version? 

Getting latest import of Actual version should not be impacted by un-published data in a different version.

entry.title: CVI Report or Transaction to trigger CVI synchronisation in S4/HANA manually for all BP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement that I need to find a report or transaction in S4/HANA that can manually starts the CVI synchronisation job meaning distributing the data from for eg. BUT0BK to LFBK and KNBK etc. Is there something similiar like this?

Thanks in advane,

Regys

entry.title: Material authorization group for QM in public cloud system
entry.content:
Hi, 

I wanted to customize the double signature option for inspection lot approval. However, the customization options are very limited, here is an image with comparison to on premise. How can I include the double authorization feature? It is very common that customers use this function, as it is also required for some ISO norms. I am looking forward to options to include this feature in the cloud system.

Best regards

Nina

entry.title: How do I debug BUS2081? As it was releasing payment block of invoices unexpectedly.
entry.content:
Hi, I have tried to release invoices in MRBR. While it was successful, BUS2081 were releasing invoices that should not be released.

Sample document A in MRBR that were released:

Material Doc # 10008

Vendor 1001

 

Sample document that was unexpectedly released by BUS2081

Material Doc # 10008

Vendor # 8001

 

Assuming that the basis of the BUS2081 was the invoice number for releasing the payment block. How do I debug it? tried to set a breakpoint in ZBUS2081 then release an invoice in MRBR but the ZBUS2081 or BUS2018 was not triggered.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Hi,

As mentioned by @thomas_jung above, badge assignments are loaded in one batch at 2:00 am US Eastern each day. So you will have to wait a bit this year for your badges to be assigned in the Community after completing tutorials. The points should show up in the gameboard, however, as soon as the badge is assigned in the Community.

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content: Front end tool is not SAC!!! SAC do not uses database user. the front end tool is Business object, row securities can not be managed in DAC as first they have incompatibilities respect to AP (no OR condition logic if multiple DAC are assigned => loose time to reinvent the weel), second the DAC works if you read a Datasphere view protected by DAC, but I can not do so as many calculation views have multiple value input parameters that are not supported in Datasphere Views (only single value IP). So the choice is Migrate hana content to BAS + HDI container, Use Datasphere as platform to extract data and future integration options. The customer today has only Datasphere, not BAS and container space. the other way whould be remake row secutiries in Business Objects (not optimized execution).

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @pavangad1 

The JWT token you generated by following the steps outlined in the blog is the same token for both the production and non-production environments.

Thanks and Regards

Mahesh Varma

entry.title: Re: Centralize Authorization Management of SAP Cloud ALM Using the Identity Provisioning Service
entry.content:
According to the Cloud ALM documentation, using federated groups is not recommended. See https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/role-assignment.

"If you're working with role mapping to user groups in your identity provider, you need to assign role collections in the SAP BTP cockpit. In this case, you can't view or change roles in the User Management app. You also can't use the role request and assignment features in SAP Cloud ALM, so we don't recommend this method."

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA Public Cloud: Development tools for Developer extensibility
entry.content:
Hello ,

I think ADT is not possible in 2 tier landscape but only in a 3 tier landcape.

Can you confirm please this? I have an error logging into tenant cloud and reading other forums it seems the root cause this. 

Thanks

Nicola

entry.content:

I hired this one to find the code error:

I have completed the course Acquiring Core ABAP Skills for certification SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud.

Please kindly help me with an exam test.

entry.title: mobile connectivity in mdk application access data through subaccount url and on-premise url
entry.content:
in mobile connectivity of mdk application i am using on-premise service with subaccount it will displaying the Authentication issuse when i am using the internal server like 

http://IP Address:Port/sap/opu/odata/SAP/ZDEMO_MDK_SRV for this i am getting error message as unable to create the destion

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
BO Support stops after 2025, intresting that there are still projects delivering data to it, especially when the Customer has already Datasphere in User. (I would assume he will/has to also use SAC in Future and this Products work very good together) 

The DAC in DSP had an update like 2 Months ago, you are able work with Patterns now, have a look here 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/introducing-new-type-of-data-access-control-quot-operator-and-value-quot/ba-p/13597594
I agree with you, before that update it was kinda nonsense to use it.

In an Analytic Model you are now able to work with Input Variables (Multiple Values), however if you wanna push it down to an IP within a SQL- or GraphicalView, I think you are currently limited to a Single Value.

entry.title: Re: Multiple email to ship to party
entry.content:
Read 2367755 - BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 and email address issues for Partners (for bad news)

Nevertheless, did you try to pass one mail address, so BAPI will create a VBPA record with one address, one mail, then use some address BAPI or ADDR_COMM* FM to add other mail addresses (ref)

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Fall in love with my Gennie and Gummy!

entry.title: Re: How do I debug BUS2081? As it was releasing payment block of invoices unexpectedly.
entry.content: Did you try to debug in update task and even in background?

entry.title: Re: mobile connectivity in mdk application access data th...
entry.content:
Do you have a destination (mdktest_instance) created although it still complains about its creation?

What do you in the event logs? (On the left side, Analytics >Logs)
